title: Logical Properties
description: Refactor physical CSS properties to logical properties for better internationalization support (LTR and RTL layouts)
html:
Logical Properties

This article uses logical properties that adapt to writing direction automatically.

Related content goes here.

validationRules.message: Title should have blue bottom border (block-end)
Sidebar should have 24px left margin (inline-start in LTR)
Sidebar should have a gray left border (inline-start)
Sidebar should have a light gray background

hints.text: Logical properties use 'block' (vertical in LTR) and 'inline' (horizontal in LTR) axes, with 'start' and 'end' instead of top/bottom/left/right.
margin-left becomes margin-inline-start. border-bottom becomes border-block-end. max-width becomes max-inline-size.
Replace all physical properties with their logical equivalents for writing-mode-aware layouts.
hints.code:
.lp-title { margin-block-end: 12px; border-block-end: 2px solid #007bff; }
.lp-sidebar { margin-inline-start: 24px; border-inline-start: 4px solid #e0e0e0; }
